underlying_goal: Execute the ultra-dev workflow to implement Task 24 (Voice UI Components) following a structured TDD process with automated code review
friction_detail: ChatPage test had a duplicate text match issue due to AI reply appearing in both ChatMessage and VoiceSubtitle, requiring a fix to only sync subtitles in voice mode.
brief_summary: User triggered the ultra-dev workflow to implement Voice UI components (Task 24) with TDD and automated review; Claude completed the full cycle including 5 new components, 378 passing tests, 6-agent code review with all P1 fixes, and merged to main.
